news.headline: Global Prison Management Systems market valued at $1.2 billion in 2024, set to reach $1.5 billion by 2030, growing at 3.7% CAGR fueled by focus on prisoner rights and welfare. Reported by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on Prison Management Systems has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for these systems was worth US$1.2 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach US$1.5 billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 3.7% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and predictions to assist in making strategic business choices. The increasing adoption of Prison Management Systems is a key highlight of the analysis provided.

news.headline: Minesto's ocean energy tech partners with SKF in global campaign. "The Faroe Islands Space Program" highlights their work.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on March 27, 2025, Minesto, a top ocean energy developer, has been chosen by SKF, a prominent bearing manufacturer, to participate in a major global marketing initiative. This collaboration is part of the extensive international brand campaign titled "The Faroe Islands Space Program," which is set to showcase innovative technologies and solutions.

news.headline: French Blockchain Group's Bitcoin account now holds $54 million, placing it in top 30 corporate Bitcoin holders.
news.summary: The recent purchase of BTC by the company has elevated it to one of the top 30 corporate holders of Bitcoin worldwide. This exclusive list is largely dominated by Michael Saylor's Strategy.

news.headline: Actinium Pharma unveils ATNM-400, achieving 99.8% tumor growth inhibition with single dose in preclinical models.
news.summary: In preclinical prostate cancer models, a remarkable 99.8% inhibition of tumor growth was observed after administering a single dose of ATNM-400. The drug was found to accumulate in tumors for a duration of up to 144 hours, while displaying minimal uptake in healthy tissues within the prostate cancer xenograft model. The preliminary preclinical data for ATNM-400 showcases its exceptional efficacy and targeted approach in combatting prostate cancer progression.

news.headline: Linearis introduces new high-throughput metabolomics platform post modernization with cutting-edge equipment for biomarker analysis.
news.summary: Quebec City witnessed the opening of Linearis' newly renovated laboratory on March 27, 2025. Equipped with state-of-the-art technology, the facility now boasts advanced equipment that enables swift and accurate biomarker analysis. This modernization effort has resulted in the establishment of a high-throughput metabolomics platform, integrating cutting-edge tools for efficient processing.

news.headline: Bob Funk, Jr. promoted to President of Express Employment International, leading Sales and Marketing teams.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Oklahoma City, Express Employment International promoted Bob Funk, Jr., to President. In his new role, Funk Jr. will oversee the Sales and Marketing teams, in addition to his current responsibilities. This change is effective immediately and signifies a key leadership shift within the company.

news.headline: TechAssure network grows with Pacific Prime and Säkra joining as new members, enhancing expertise in tech insurance.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, TechAssure, a leading network focused on enhancing corporate insurance and risk management within technology sectors, welcomed Pacific Prime and Säkra as its latest members. The addition of these two firms, known for their outstanding expertise, expands TechAssure's network and strengthens its resources for its members. The inclusion of Pacific Prime and Säkra highlights TechAssure's commitment to fostering collaboration and innovation within the industry.

news.headline: CURRENC provides Coin Cove with AI-powered electronic banking services to enhance user experience.
news.summary: A groundbreaking all-in-one solution is poised to revolutionize the electronic banking sector. With this innovative turnkey offering, customers can expect a complete transformation in their banking experience. This comprehensive solution integrates a range of services and features, enhancing convenience and efficiency for users. The initiative is set to significantly impact the industry, with a projected uptick in customer satisfaction and engagement. This pioneering solution is expected to set a new standard in electronic banking, with targeted improvements across various key metrics.

news.headline: NeoVolta expects to generate over $2 million in first quarter revenue, marking a 600% increase from the previous year due to new product popularity.
news.summary: NeoVolta is projected to achieve a substantial growth in revenue for the first quarter, with anticipated earnings of $2 million. This marks a remarkable 600% year-over-year increase. The surge in revenue can be attributed to the strong performance of new products and the escalating demand for home energy storage solutions.

news.headline: MACOM to present connectivity solutions at OFC 2025 in San Francisco, Booth 2028 from April 1 to 3.
news.summary: MACOM is set to exhibit its newest connectivity innovations at Booth 2028 during OFC 2025, taking place from April 1 to 3, 2025, in San Francisco, California. This event will feature a wide range of cutting-edge solutions designed to enhance connectivity, with attendees having the opportunity to explore the latest offerings from MACOM firsthand.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up after Trump's new tariffs; Nvidia stock down, Tesla up.
news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures increased following the announcement of President Donald Trump's latest tariffs. During this time, Nvidia's stock experienced a decline, whereas Tesla saw a positive movement. This shift in the market occurred despite the ongoing fluctuation in trade policies and global economic trends. It is important to note that these changes are reflective of the current economic climate and can impact various industries and investors.

news.headline: Anta Kids hosts LingLoong Run in Xiamen with 500 families and Olympic champions, promoting family engagement and Earth protection.
news.summary: In Xiamen, China, on March 22, 2025, Anta Kids organized the "LingLoong Parent-Child Run" and Earth Protection Workshop, which saw the participation of 500 families. The event featured Olympic champions Yang Wei, Chen Yibing, He Chong, and Qu Chunyu. It combined running activities with a focus on environmental conservation as part of the initiatives.

news.headline: BASports.com named best MLB handicapper with 48 #1 finishes in national contests, experts say.
news.summary: Renowned handicapper Dr. Bob Akmens has achieved an impressive 48 top finishes in national MLB Baseball handicapping contests. Based in Wauchula, Florida, the 2025 MLB Baseball regular season commenced with BASports.com being hailed as the premier baseball handicapper by industry experts worldwide.

news.headline: OOKA expands its offerings in the US with Pacific Realms CBD Pods launch, available in three blends.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated March 27, 2025, Charlotte-based company OOKA, under the umbrella of Advanced Inhalation Rituals (AIR), unveiled the introduction of their latest product line, Pacific Realms CBD Pods, in the U.S. market. These pods will come in three distinct blends, such as Calm featuring vanilla elements. The launch showcases the company's commitment to expanding their offerings in the CBD sector, aiming to tap into the growing demand for such products. Consumers across the United States can now access these new options which cater to various preferences.

news.headline: Shareholding of director/PDMR acquires 7,000 shares.
Gundry MD's MCT Wellness sells over 5 million units, featuring C8 MCT and polyphenols for fat burning.
news.summary: Gundry MD has introduced MCT Wellness, a dietary supplement drink containing C8 MCT and polyphenols designed to enhance the body's fat-burning capabilities. The product was launched in Los Angeles on March 27, 2025. Gundry MD®, known for innovative health supplements, revealed the arrival of this new drink aimed at promoting weight loss.

news.headline: U.S. Will Registry introduces Planned Legacy Program to enhance nonprofit giving with customizable online will-writing platform.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 27, 2025, The U.S. Will Registry unveiled The Planned Legacy Program, Inc. This innovative program prioritizes donors and aids nonprofits in deploying a personalized online will-writing system. This initiative aims to enhance legacy giving by providing a simpler and more adaptable approach for individuals looking to contribute to charitable causes. The platform is designed to make legacy giving more user-friendly and convenient for a wider audience, ultimately facilitating increased contributions towards nonprofit organizations.

news.headline: Floor & Decor opens new Kissimmee store in Orlando area with 50 associates, led by Chief Merchant Yoanni Soria.
news.summary: Floor & Decor, a high-growth retailer focused on hard-surface flooring for homeowners and professionals, has recently opened a new warehouse in Kissimmee, Orlando. Located at 2420 West Osceola Parkway, the store is led by Chief Executive Merchant Yoanni Soria and employs around 50 full-time and part-time associates. This marks the latest addition to Floor & Decor's chain of warehouse stores and design centers.

news.headline: UAE watch market expected to grow from $410.05 Mn in 2024 to $596.21 Mn in 2033 with a CAGR of 4.79%.
news.summary: A report on the United Arab Emirates Watch Market forecasts significant growth, with the market expected to increase from US$410.05 million in 2024 to US$596.21 million in 2033. This indicates a compound annual growth rate of 4.79% from 2025 to 2033. The rising consumer demand for luxury watches is a key factor fueling this market expansion. The report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com and provides insights into the size, share, growth trends, and forecasts for the UAE watch market in the coming years.

news.headline: Sompo authorized to provide primary insurance in Belgium and Netherlands, expanding operations in Continental Europe.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Sompo, a prominent global provider of property and casualty insurance, revealed that it has obtained approval from regulatory authorities to offer primary insurance in Belgium and the Netherlands. This development signifies a significant step for the company's expansion, consolidating its presence in the region. The granting of licenses underscores Sompo's commitment to serving clients in these markets and furthering its position as a key player in the insurance industry.

news.headline: February saw a slight narrowing of the U.S. trade deficit after hitting a record high in January.
MaxLinear presents 1.6T Rushmore and 400G/800G Keystone PAM4 DSPs at OFC 2025, booth 5961, focusing on AI/ML datacenters.
news.summary: An innovative technology company based in Carlsbad, California, MaxLinear will be presenting its latest advancements at OFC 2025 in booth 5961. The highlight of the showcase will be the unveiling of the next-generation 1.6T Rushmore along with the 400G/800G Keystone PAM4 DSPs. This display signifies an important step forward in the field of artificial intelligence, demonstrating MaxLinear's commitment to cutting-edge and high-performance solutions.

news.headline: SBB Research Group Foundation sponsors Scratch Foundation in effort to make coding accessible and free for children worldwide.
news.summary: In Chicago, the Scratch Foundation worked with the SBB Research Group Foundation to support local nonprofits through the Champion A Charity Program. The initiative aims to provide free coding opportunities to children worldwide, promoting creativity and problem-solving skills. Through this collaboration, the foundation is making coding accessible to young minds, fostering their development in a fun and interactive manner.

news.headline: Germany urges Europe to counter Trump's auto tariffs. US market vital for German auto sector, facing challenges from China.
news.summary: The German auto industry heavily relies on the United States as an essential export market. This is significant as the industry is currently experiencing challenges due to declining sales and rising competition, particularly from China. The US market plays a vital role in supporting the German auto sector, making up a substantial portion of its export sales. The industry is facing tough times amid tough competition and sluggish demand, making the US market even more crucial for its stability and growth.

news.headline: ZincFive named to TIME’s Top GreenTech Companies 2025 lists for nickel-zinc batteries, recognized for safe, sustainable power solutions.
news.summary: A company based in Portland, Oregon called ZincFive has been recognized by TIME for its environmentally friendly initiatives. Specifically, they have been named to TIME's World & America’s Top GreenTech Companies lists for 2025. ZincFive specializes in developing safe and sustainable nickel-zinc battery power solutions. This acknowledgment highlights their commitment to providing innovative and eco-friendly energy solutions.

news.headline: US identified as major plastic waste producer with 42 million metric tons in 2023. Sustainable packaging urged.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, on March 27, 2025, sources revealed that the United States is among the top global producers of plastic waste. Recent data from 2023 showed a significant contribution from the country, producing a massive 42 million metric tons of plastic waste. This has solidified the US position as a major contributor to the global plastic waste issue. Additionally, legislative actions are being considered to address this growing concern.

news.headline: Armas Pharmaceuticals brings back Lidocaine Jelly 2% 30mL to U.S. market after being unavailable for 2+ years.
news.summary: Armas Pharmaceuticals, a reputable pharmaceutical company, is excited to announce the relaunch of Lidocaine Jelly 2% 30mL in the U.S. market after being out of stock for over two years. This crucial product is finally available again, providing relief to patients in need.

news.headline: HARTING's 3D-Circuits driving innovation in consumer electronics with advanced tech. 3D-MID at the forefront.
news.summary: In BIEL, Switzerland, on March 27, 2025, the consumer electronics sector is undergoing a significant shift due to swift technological progress and a growing need for small, effective, and versatile devices. At the core of this change is 3D-MID technology, which has gained substantial momentum in the industry. This innovative technology integrates mechanical and electronic functions into three-dimensional molded interconnect devices, enhancing their efficiency and compactness. As a result, manufacturers are witnessing an increased demand, with a steep rise of around 25% in the adoption of 3D-MID technology across various consumer electronics segments. This trend is indicative of a notable transformation within the industry, driven by the pursuit of more advanced and convenient electronic solutions.

news.headline: California Pizza Kitchen celebrates 40 years with Busy Philipps, surprises for guests, upgraded promos.
news.summary: Celebrating its 40th anniversary, California Pizza Kitchen (CPK) in Costa Mesa, California, is hosting a special event filled with surprises. The iconic restaurant known for its unique approach to casual dining is reintroducing fan-favorite dishes and enhancing its Thank You Card promotion to appreciate every guest. Former employee and actor Busy Philipps will be joining in the celebration, as CPK looks forward to its next chapter.

news.headline: Zeta Global launches AI Agent Studio with new AI-powered marketing techniques in NYC. #Innovation #AI #Marketing
news.summary: In New York, Zeta has introduced the AI Agent Studio, featuring innovative Agentic Workflows to lead the advancement of AI-driven marketing strategies. This launch signals a significant step forward in leveraging artificial intelligence for marketing purposes. The studio promises to revolutionize the industry with its cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: CP Group appoints Christopher Cauthen as Senior Vice President in Dallas, leading operations in the Southwest.
news.summary: CP Group, a top owner-operator of office properties in the Sunbelt region, has welcomed Christopher “Tex” Cauthen as their new Senior Vice President. Based in Dallas, Cauthen will oversee CP Group’s acquisitions, developments, and operations in vital Southwest markets such as Texas, Colorado, and Arizona. With more than 20 years of experience in leadership and the industry, Cauthen has a successful history in acquisitions and asset management.

news.headline: 3650 Capital receives $215M investments from CalSTRS, Mubadala for real estate lending operations.
news.summary: In Miami, 3650 Capital, a leading commercial real estate lender and solutions provider, has revealed securing $215 million in fresh capital investments. The funding comes from existing investors, the California State Teachers’ Retirement System (CalSTRS) and Mubadala Investment Company. This injection of capital will be utilized across 3650’s lending operations, servicing, and asset management activities, providing support to global institutions.

news.headline: ICE and Circle sign agreement to explore using USDC and USYC for product innovation, targeting new solutions for customers.
news.summary: Atlanta and New York - Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE: ICE) and Circle Internet Group, Inc. have revealed a collaboration today. ICE, known for its technology and data services, and Circle, a prominent financial technology firm and leader in stablecoin transactions, have joined forces. The partnership aims to potentially utilize Circle's stablecoin, USDC, and tokenized money market product, US Yield Coin (USYC), for creating innovative solutions. This venture could lead to the development of new offerings for customers by leveraging ICE's extensive global market network.

news.headline: Arctos expands Keystone into real estate and real assets with formation of AK-RA team of four new hires.
news.summary: Arctos, a private investment firm based in Dallas, has revealed the establishment of Arctos Keystone Real Assets (AK-RA) to diversify its offerings in real estate and real assets sectors. This move aims to augment Arctos Keystone's existing capabilities beyond sports franchises and alternative asset managers. AK-RA will function as an independent investment strategy separate from the Keystone Private Equity strategy. The AK-RA team, consisting of four new members, marks a strategic expansion for the firm.

news.headline: NY and Midwest dominate Redfin's Hottest Neighborhoods of 2025, 5 in Midwest suburbs, NY & San Fran also in demand.
news.summary: In a recent report by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), it was revealed that five out of the top 10 hottest neighborhoods of 2025 are located in Midwest suburbs. The real estate brokerage firm analyzed and ranked U.S. zip codes in the 150 most populous metro areas based on year-over-year growth in listings. Additionally, the report highlighted a demand for pricey coastal cities, with neighborhoods in New York and San Francisco also making the list. This trend is attributed to workers returning to the office following the pandemic. The findings suggest a shift in real estate preferences towards suburban and urban areas, with a clear influence of post-pandemic lifestyle changes on housing markets.

news.headline: Republic Bank selects Fiserv's DNA platform to boost digital transformation, with over $6 billion in assets and 47 locations.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based Fiserv, Inc. (NYSE: FI), a prominent provider of payments and financial services technology, revealed that Republic Bank & Trust Company (Republic Bank) has selected the Fiserv DNA® platform to bolster its banking system functionalities. Republic Bank, a community bank headquartered in Louisville, with assets exceeding $6 billion and 47 banking centers, made this decision to achieve their digital transformation objectives and improve operational efficiencies.

news.headline: Trade deficit in the U.S. decreased marginally after reaching a record high last month.
Hallmark partners with CareRev to provide hospitals with instant access to 35K+ per diem nurses, enhancing flexibility and reducing staffing expenses.
news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between Hallmark and CareRev in Charlestown, Massachusetts. This partnership aims to provide hospitals with immediate access to over 35,000 per diem nurses. This initiative is designed to enhance flexibility in staffing while also reducing costs associated with workforce management.

news.headline: OWC launches Jellyfish B24 and Jellyfish S24 storage solutions for professionals in video and audio production.
news.summary: In Woodstock, Illinois, Other World Computing (OWC) unveiled the OWC Jellyfish B24 and OWC Jellyfish S24, expanding its shared storage offerings. OWC, a key player in high-performance storage solutions, serves professionals in video, audio production, and photography, providing tools to enhance workflow performance and reliability. The GA launch of these products marks a significant milestone for OWC, enabling users to maximize productivity.

news.headline: Houthis claim launching two missiles at Israel.
OSI Systems gets $76M order for aviation security systems to deploy RTT 110 and Itemiser 5X at an international airport.
news.summary: In Hawthorne, California, OSI Systems, Inc. revealed that their Security division has secured a substantial contract worth around $76 million. The contract entails supplying airport screening solutions for a significant international airport. The deployment will include cutting-edge systems such as the RTT® 110 (Real Time Tomography) explosive detection system for screening hold baggage and Itemiser® 5X for identifying trace quantities of explosives and narcotics. The President and CEO of OSI Systems expressed satisfaction with this development.

news.headline: Zoetis to discuss Q1 2025 financial results in webcast and call on May 6, 2025 at 8:30am ET with CEO and CFO.
news.summary: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) is set to hold a webcast and conference call on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. (ET). During the event, Chief Executive Officer Kristin Peck and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Wetteny Joseph will discuss the company's financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. They will also take questions from financial analysts. The live webcast can be accessed by investors and the public through the Zoetis website at http://investor.zoetis.com/events-presentations.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands expands presence in Ontario with CWENCH Hydration™ at Healthy Planet and Farm Boy, now in 1,800+ locations.
news.summary: Toronto-based Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has confirmed that CWENCH Hydration™, their leading product, is now stocked at Healthy Planet and Farm Boy stores throughout Ontario. This includes over 1,800 retail locations across North America. Healthy Planet, with 38 stores in Ontario, is one of the newly added retailers. CWENCH Hydration™ stands as Cizzle Brands' flagship product, now more accessible to consumers through these partnerships.

news.headline: US Wholesale Inventories February 2025 Report
Fitch Ratings: Impact of US tariff hikes starting to appear in macro data.
J&T Express released its 2024 ESG Report, highlighting sustainable practices in its logistics network.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Hong Kong, J&T Global Express Limited, identified as J&T Express or J&T with stock code 01519, a worldwide logistics service provider, disclosed its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The Report highlights the Company's dedication to sustainability and responsible business practices.

news.headline: Oxford Industries (OXM) to report Q4 earnings on Mar. 27, projecting $1.27 EPS and $383.94M revenue with a dividend yield of 4.34%. Stock has potential for $500 monthly earnings.
news.summary: Oxford Industries, Inc. will announce its fourth-quarter financial results on March 27 after the market closes. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.27 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $1.90 per share last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $383.94 million, down from $404.43 million from the previous year. Telsey Advisory Group maintained Oxford Industries with a Market Perform rating and reduced the price target from $86 to $68. The company's current annual dividend yield stands at 4.34%, with a quarterly dividend of 67 cents per share. This information, along with additional details, can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ClearanceJobs (NYSE: DHX) expands staffing solutions for security-cleared talent acquisition, offering RPO and other hiring support.
news.summary: DHI Group, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, ClearanceJobs, has broadened its Staffing Solutions services. The platform, tailored for professionals with security clearances, now facilitates connections between employers and skilled individuals for contract, contract-to-hire, and permanent roles. The enhanced offering includes Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), direct hiring, and veteran support. This expansion aims to streamline the hiring process for companies seeking top-tier security-cleared talent. ClearanceJobs is recognized for its role in linking professionals with active security clearances to job opportunities.

news.headline: Yonsei University finds direct evidence of Wigner crystals and electronic rotons for the first time.
news.summary: In an unprecedented discovery, electronic rotons, previously difficult to detect, have been identified for the first time. This breakthrough was made by researchers at Yonsei University in Seoul, South Korea and has shed light on the formation of Wigner crystallites within a two-dimensional electron liquid. The findings, announced on March 27, 2025, mark a significant advancement in the understanding of electronic behavior. The researchers' work has unveiled crucial insights into the intricate dynamics of electronic rotons, providing valuable data for further exploration in this field. This pioneering research is poised to deepen our comprehension of electronic systems and their potential applications.

news.headline: CEO Martin Legault resigns from Premier Health, stepping down as President and CEO of the Corporation.
news.summary: Premier Health has reported that Martin Legault has stepped down from his position as President and Chief Executive Officer of the company.
